## Testing

List the checks you ran and their results.

If this pull request adds a new feature, include the tests that cover it.

## Configuration or Docs Impact

Describe any changes to environment variables, runtime behavior, deployment setup, or documentation. If none, say so.

If this pull request adds a new feature, include the documentation updates needed to explain and use it.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is scoped to one change
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] If this pull request adds a new feature, tests for that feature are included
- [ ] If this pull request adds a new feature, the necessary documentation updates are included
- [ ] `README.md` was updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or environment-specific files are included
